extDescription.message: Launch IITC for Ingress Intel with ease.

titleDefault.description: Title for the button at the application panel

needRebootIntel.message: Changes will be applied after rebooting Intel

installFromUrlHint.message: Paste a direct link to a .user.js file

updateChannelHint.message: Determines which build of IITC-CE the extension fetches

customServerTooltipError.message: Custom server is unavailable or does not contain $FILE$

updateFrequencyHint.message: How often the extension checks for updates

pluginUserNotice.message: This plugin was installed by the user

pluginOverrideNotice.message: This user plugin overrides an official plugin

addedUserScriptTo.message: $PLUGIN_NAME$ has been added to the "$PLUGIN_CATEGORY$" category.

errorReadingFile.message: An error occurred while reading $PLUGIN_NAME$ file.

dropJSHereOrClick.message: Drop .js files here or click to upload.

willBeOverwrittenByNewPlugin.message: Plugin with the same ID will be overwritten by the new plugin.

serverNotAvailableRetry.message: The server is not available. Retry after $NUM$ second

jsViewDetailsNoDomains.message: This script did not ask for access rights to the sites. It seems to be an invalid plugin.

jsViewDetailsAllDomains.message: This script requested access to all sites. Use it if you trust the author.

jsViewDetailsDomainsLabel.message: The script will run on these sites:

overwriteBuiltinPlugin.message: This will overwrite the built-in plugin of the same name

overwriteInstalledPlugin.message: This will overwrite an already installed plugin of the same name

import_message.message: Select the .zip file with the IITC Button backup and then select what to import

warningAboutImportLocalStorage.message: Clears and replaces all data of this extension with data from the selected json.

invalidBackup.message: The file is corrupted or is not a backup of IITC Button

warningAboutLocalStoragePart1.message: Note that localStorage contains all the data available to the IITC Button. For example, including a list of your plugins and their source code, may include settings of some plugins (depends on their implementation).

warningAboutLocalStoragePart2.message: Do not expose this data publicly if you use faction plugins!

alertChromeRequiresUserScriptsTitle.message: Enable User Scripts for this extension due to Manifest V3 limitations in Chrome

alertHostPermissionsRequiredTitle.message: Provide access to URLs for userscripts to work. You will be able to change your choice in your browser settings.

alertHostPermissionsRequiredButtonAllUrl.message: All URLs to ensure full support
